reason: Ships misuse-resistant builder plus semantic validator for genuinely error-prone strict format.
Basic Python list/dict patterns any capable agent already knows without help.
Real irreversibility-based ordering, done_when gate, and human sign-off separation.
Three drafts, 15-cell scoring matrix, double link audit, for any edit.
Org-specific taxonomy and format with explicit checklist and human-judgment seam.
All conventions deferred as usual or standard, no concrete header, format, or params given.
Concrete brand values, misuse fences, explicit compare-artifact-to-table exit check.
Silent-failure pipe format handled by hand and eyeballing, not a builder or validator script.
Forces a rigid five-step order with no real dependency justifying it.
Concrete good and bad examples, hard fences, explicit per-message exit judgment.
Detailed org format but no check step before circulating minutes.
Format facts, fences, and explicit checklist exit against the diff.
